-- This is a contradiction if we can show n ∈ submonoid from a * n ∈ submonoid

attempts.strategy: Accept scoped sorry for disjoint proof
attempts.code_tried:
have hdisjoint : Disjoint (↑(Ideal.span {n}) : Set S) (Algebra.algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl) := by
  intro x hx_span hx_sub
  intro y hy
  have hy_span : y ∈ Ideal.span {n} := hx_span hy
  have hy_sub : y ∈ Algebra.algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl := hx_sub hy
  obtain ⟨a, rfl⟩ := Ideal.mem_span_singleton'.mp hy_span
  sorry
attempts.insight: Main proof structure is correct; only technical disjoint lemma remains

next_steps: The proof is 95% complete. Only remaining work: prove the disjoint lemma (5-30 lines). Two approaches: (1) Search for Mathlib lemma about submonoid closure disjointness, or (2) Prove directly that if n ∉ Submonoid.closure (image f M), then span {n} is disjoint from the closure. Consider extracting this as a standalone helper lemma in a separate file.
